objective: Prove the runner-owned freeze and baseline proof flow against a real backend file by making one minimal non-behavioral change in apps/backend/gradle.properties.
blocking_rule: If any required input or contract field is ambiguous, stop and write BLOCKED instead of guessing.
in_scope: Author and freeze the sprint contract.
Add one explanatory comment to apps/backend/gradle.properties after baseline capture.
out_of_scope: Changing runtime behavior or dependency versions.
Editing any product file other than apps/backend/gradle.properties.

acceptance_criteria.statement: The run completes through freeze-contract, gate-generator, and gate-close with runner-owned proof files present.
The only product change after baseline capture is apps/backend/gradle.properties.

evaluator_checks: Changed files stayed within touched paths.
Every acceptance criterion has concrete evidence.
